articles.title: Ripple-backed Flare Announces Litecoin Airdrop
articles.description: XRP wallets included in the December snapshot will receive a Flare tokens (worth a huge amount of money, potentially). Now, in a Jan. 8, 2020 tweet, Flare says that they will “reduce” the number of Flare tokens for the project’s founders by 5 billion. This extra will be distributed to “Litecoin participants.” The Tweet promises … Continued

articles.title: Polkadot becomes first blockchain platform to rebrand through a bounty program
articles.description: Blockchain platform Polkadot announced that it has hired leading design agency Koto to give the blockchain platform a complete design revamp.

articles.title: Flare Networks Announces Litecoin Airdrop, Plans To Bring DeFi and Smart Contracts to LTC and XRP
articles.description: Flare Networks is announcing plans to integrate with Litecoin, bringing decentralized finance (DeFi) and smart contracts to the cryptocurrency’s platform. In a tweet Friday, Flare shared the news that it will now offer support for both the fifth and fourth-largest crypto assets by market cap. The Ripple-backed startup says it will airdrop Litecoin (LTC) holders […]

articles.title: Cardano becomes the most decentralized network on the market with majority of ADA supply staked
articles.description: With more than 69 percent of its total circulating supply now staked, Cardano has surpassed Polkadot as the most decentralized network in the world.

articles.title: Ripple, Chris Larsen and Coinbase Transfer Whopping 520 Million XRP
articles.description: Recent data says that Ripple together with its cofounder and the largest US-based exchange Coinbase have transferred over half a billion XRP
